text: Yeah, I know it's a big one, change it to it, your story points. And I'm looking forward to seeing that QuickSight thing working, at least for whatever we have, so that I can, you know, I want to run it by business to see their thoughts on it sooner than later, right? Okay, yes, absolutely. By the way, the QA environment is absolutely stable, you can test if you want. Thank you.
